title: Standards of care for the health of transgender and gender diverse people, Version 8
author: Coleman E, Radix AE, Bouman WP, et al.
notes: WPATH Standards of Care Version 8 (SOC8). Authoritative clinical guidelines from the World Professional Association for Transgender Health. DOI: 10.1080/26895269.2022.2100644. International Journal of Transgender Health 23(Suppl 1): S1-S259. Published by Taylor & Francis under open access. Load-bearing source for harm-context framing in EVT-033: SOC8 documents the clinical evidence base for gender-affirming care, including for adolescents. Publication date set to volume publication date; DOI published 2022. Full author list abbreviated; lead author E. Coleman (University of Minnesota Medical School Institute for Sexual and Gender Health). Tier 1 (peer-reviewed clinical standard; original research and meta-analysis; established clinical authority). PDF available open access via DOI.
